# EvoClaw v1.0.0-beta.1

First public beta of EvoClaw 1.0. Pre-built binaries are available for macOS, Linux, and Windows — no Rust toolchain required.

---

## What's New in v1.0.0-beta.1

### Full TUI Rewrite
- Replaced the old scrolling-stdout output with a persistent event-driven terminal UI
- Fixed input bar stays anchored at the bottom; conversation history scrolls above it
- Clean startup: launches into a fresh screen like a native terminal app
- Clean shutdown: restores the terminal to its original state on Ctrl-C or Ctrl-D

### Streaming Output
- Assistant responses stream token-by-token with a live status line
- Buffered delta ordering fix: all response content is guaranteed to appear before the completion marker — no more truncated or missing output on fast machines

### Multi-Platform Release Pipeline
- GitHub Actions builds six binary targets on every version tag
- Each archive bundles the binary + README + SHA-256 checksum file
- Beta releases are published as GitHub pre-releases; stable releases update the public website

### Release Notes System
- `.github/release-notes/<tag>.md` — notes for stable releases
- `.github/beta-notes/<tag>.md` — notes for beta/rc releases (this file)

---

## Download

Go to the **[Releases page](https://github.com/DevEloLin/evoclaw/releases/tag/v1.0.0-beta.1)** and download the archive for your platform.

### macOS

```bash
# Apple Silicon (M1/M2/M3/M4)
curl -LO https://github.com/DevEloLin/evoclaw/releases/download/v1.0.0-beta.1/evoclaw-aarch64-apple-darwin.tar.gz
shasum -a 256 -c evoclaw-aarch64-apple-darwin.tar.gz.sha256
tar -xzf evoclaw-aarch64-apple-darwin.tar.gz
chmod +x evoclaw && sudo mv evoclaw /usr/local/bin/
evoclaw
```

### Linux

```bash
# x86_64
curl -LO https://github.com/DevEloLin/evoclaw/releases/download/v1.0.0-beta.1/evoclaw-x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu.tar.gz
shasum -a 256 -c evoclaw-x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu.tar.gz.sha256
tar -xzf evoclaw-x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu.tar.gz
chmod +x evoclaw && sudo mv evoclaw /usr/local/bin/
evoclaw
```

```bash
# ARM64 (Raspberry Pi 4, AWS Graviton, etc.)
curl -LO https://github.com/DevEloLin/evoclaw/releases/download/v1.0.0-beta.1/evoclaw-aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu.tar.gz
shasum -a 256 -c evoclaw-aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu.tar.gz.sha256
tar -xzf evoclaw-aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu.tar.gz
chmod +x evoclaw && sudo mv evoclaw /usr/local/bin/
evoclaw
```

```bash
# x86_64 static (musl) — Alpine, containers, cross-distro
curl -LO https://github.com/DevEloLin/evoclaw/releases/download/v1.0.0-beta.1/evoclaw-x86_64-unknown-linux-musl.tar.gz
shasum -a 256 -c evoclaw-x86_64-unknown-linux-musl.tar.gz.sha256
tar -xzf evoclaw-x86_64-unknown-linux-musl.tar.gz
chmod +x evoclaw && sudo mv evoclaw /usr/local/bin/
evoclaw
```

### Windows

```powershell
# x86_64 — run in PowerShell
Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://github.com/DevEloLin/evoclaw/releases/download/v1.0.0-beta.1/evoclaw-x86_64-pc-windows-msvc.zip" -OutFile evoclaw.zip
Expand-Archive evoclaw.zip -DestinationPath "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\evoclaw"
$env:PATH += ";$env:LOCALAPPDATA\evoclaw"
evoclaw.exe
```

> Homebrew tap tracks stable releases only. For this beta, use the manual install above.

---

## Known Issues

- TUI startup briefly clears the terminal; scrollback from previous sessions is not preserved on launch
- Windows binary is untested on non-English system locales

## Testing Focus

- Interactive REPL: input editing (Ctrl+A/E/K/U/W), history (up/down, Ctrl-P/N), reverse search (Ctrl-R), Tab completion
- Streaming output: long responses, code blocks, fast providers
- All six binary targets on their native platforms
- Multi-channel adapters: Slack Socket Mode, Telegram long-poll, Discord Gateway WS

---

## Checksums

SHA-256 checksums are provided as `.sha256` files alongside each archive.
